events.title: Figure Drawing [27]
events.address: 200 N Arthur Ashe Blvd, Richmond, VA 23220
events.description: Start by exploring a variety of drawings of the human form by other artists. Then with guidance from the instructor and working from a live model, learn to create expressive portraits in charcoal and pencil. Prerequisites: basic drawing skills. Instructor: Amy Smith

events.title: 18+ Figure Drawing: March Session
events.description: Ongoing nude figure drawing series open to all artists 18+. March session features a long pose with a single model. Tickets required in advance. 18+ ID required at door. No phones or photos during event.

events.title: Figure Drawing Open Studio
events.description: Monthly figure drawing open studio with a live model. Tables and chairs provided; bring your own drawing materials. Ages 18+, no registration required.

events.title: 18+ Figure Drawing: April Session
events.description: Ongoing nude figure drawing series open to all artists 18+. April session features short poses with a single model — ideal for quick sketches and gestural drawings. Tickets required in advance. 18+ ID required at door.

events.title: Figure Drawing Open Studio
events.description: Monthly figure drawing open studio with a live model. Tables and chairs provided; bring your own drawing materials. Ages 18+, no registration required.

events.title: 18+ Figure Drawing: May Session
events.description: Ongoing nude figure drawing series open to all artists 18+. May session features a long pose with a single model. Tickets required in advance. 18+ ID required at door. No phones or photos during event.
